experience.description: Developed a high-performance Chinese dictionary application for Windows/MacOS, handling large datasets (60,000 types). Optimized MySQL queries, implemented fast data retrieval (Chinese, Sino-Vietnamese, Pinyin, stroke count, radicals, conversions). Designed user-friendly UI/UX with customization. Integrated AI for Chinese character recognition and image-based lookup.

Designed responsive UI/UX for an e-commerce website. Developed core features including product search, filtering, login, contact, chatbox, buy/sell posts, and a sales dashboard. Optimized database architecture and SQL queries for efficient data processing.
